leadText: The Galarica Cuff (Japanese: ガラナツブレス Galanut Bracelet) is a type of Evolution item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Galarian Slowpoke to evolve into Galarian Slowbro upon use. This consumes the Galarica Cuff.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy. S V ZA A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh N/A $ 1,500 S V ZA N/A $ 750 Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Galarian Slowpoke to evolve into Galarian Slowbro upon use. This consumes the Galarica Cuff. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy. S V ZA A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh IA Workout Sea (from a woman on a small island in exchange for eight Galarica Twigs ) S V ID Coastal Plaza (from a girl near the vending machines in exchange for eight Galarica Twigs ) ZA Vert Sector 9 (Reward for completing Side Mission 75: "Some Unusual Pokémon") ZA MD Destroy Floating Poké Ball in 2 Star or higher Hyperspace Zones with Item Power: Special
